bank.retain_mission: Extract backend-architecture decisions, database schema/optimization choices, data-engineering pipelines, and CMS integrations.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the backend stack, data stores, schema conventions, and recurring performance/data-quality issues. Ignore one-off bug fixes.

mental_models.name: Backend Stack
mental_models.source_query: What is the backend stack? Languages, frameworks, data stores, key services.

mental_models.name: Data Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What data-modeling, query, and pipeline patterns hold? Include perf baselines and recurring issues.
